descriptions.title: Opening slide: big deck title, audio note line, prepared-for and prepared-by blocks
descriptions.agenda: Table of contents divider; only the heading is fillable (list items are fixed navigation links)
descriptions.problem: Problem statement: big heading plus a two-line statement of the problem
descriptions.insight: One key insight in depth: headline claim, 4-line analysis, 2-line caption, and one supporting image
descriptions.highlights: Two side-by-side highlight cards: short heading + 2-line quote/insight each
descriptions.segments: Three-column audience/segment breakdown: 3 short headers with a 1-3 line description under each
descriptions.process: Numbered 3-step process flow: 01/02/03 with a short title and 1-2 line description per step
descriptions.summary: Summary: big heading plus a 2-line recap
descriptions.gallery: Visual showcase: heading plus three image frames (good for examples, mockups, samples)
descriptions.closing: Closing Q&A slide with email/social/website contact lines
